code:
import io
import string
import list

fn parse_line(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(s)
  while i < n
    mut skipping = true
    while skipping
      if i >= n
        skipping = false
      else
        let b = match string.byte_at(s, i)
        when Some(x)
          x
        when None
          0
        end
        if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13 or b == 10
          i = i + 1
        else
          skipping = false
        end
      end
    end
    let start = i
    mut reading = true
    while reading
      if i >= n
        reading = false
      else
        let b = match string.byte_at(s, i)
        when Some(x)
          x
        when None
          0
        end
        if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13 or b == 10
          reading = false
        else
          i = i + 1
        end
      end
    end
    if start < i
      let tok = string.substring(s, start, i)
      match string.parse_int(tok)
      when Some(v)
        result = list.push(result, v)
      when None
        ()
      end
    end
  end
  result
end

fn insert_sorted(_ xs: List<Int>, _ v: Int) -> List<Int>
  if list.contains(xs, v)
    xs
  else
    mut result: List<Int> = []
    mut inserted = false
    for x in xs
      if not inserted and v < x
        result = list.push(result, v)
        inserted = true
      end
      result = list.push(result, x)
    end
    if not inserted
      result = list.push(result, v)
    end
    result
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let l1 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let l2 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let xs1 = parse_line(l1)
  let xs2 = parse_line(l2)
  mut sorted: List<Int> = []
  for x in xs1
    sorted = insert_sorted(sorted, x)
  end
  for x in xs2
    sorted = insert_sorted(sorted, x)
  end
  mut out = ""
  mut first = true
  for x in sorted
    if first
      out = "#{x}"
      first = false
    else
      out = "#{out} #{x}"
    end
  end
  println(out)
end
